library: בית המדרש לרבנים · בית המדרש לרבנים
description: Probably a legal query and responsum mainly in Judaeo-Arabic. Deals with business matters. Almost all the names are anonymized ("fulān"). Mentions counterfeit promissory notes (wa-l-ḥujaj allatī taẓharu kulluhā zūr). Mentions certain villages and a man named ʿAlī b. Shādān. Mentions a judge. Needs examination.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
